---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project.
title: "feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

Please describe the feature you want to suggest.

## Problem Statement

Explain what problem this feature solves, or why its needed.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you want to see happen. Explain how the feature should work or how it should look in the user interface.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any other ways you thought about solving this problem, and why they might not be as good as your proposed solution (unless u are not sure, if u are not sure, feel free to leave all of the solutions).
